title: Castelaria galapagei
taxonomy: Castelaria galapagei is classified as a species of calcareous algae. It belongs to the family Hapalidiaceae, which is a group of calcareous green algae. This species is typically found in tropical and subtropical regions, often growing on rocks and coral reefs. The classification of Castelaria galapagei also places it within the phylum Chlorophyta, a group of green algae. Further classification includes the order Siphonocladales and the family Hapalidiaceae.
